mapper.sql: id, agent_id, user_login_name, business_system, memory_type, title, content, importance, recall_count, source_session_id, lifecycle_state, pinned, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent_memory SET recall_count = recall_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_agent_memory SET lifecycle_state = 'stale', update_time = NOW() WHERE lifecycle_state = 'active' AND pinned = 0 AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), COALESCE(update_time, create_time)) > #{days}
